hero.headline: Revenue Problems Are Structural Before They Are Tactical.
hero.subhead: I help agencies and service businesses find the friction in their commercial system, fix what matters first, and build a revenue engine their team can actually run.

ideology.title: Five Stages. One System.
ideology.subtitle: Most businesses optimize individual tactics. We align the entire buyer journey — from first impression to long-term relationship — into one coherent commercial system.

stages.title: Awareness
stages.description: Get found by the right buyers in the right places — before they ever talk to a salesperson.

stages.title: Consideration
stages.description: Make it easy for buyers to evaluate your approach, understand the problem, and see why you're the right fit.

stages.title: Decision
stages.description: Remove the friction that stalls deals — unclear proof, unanswered objections, and complicated next steps.

stages.title: Conversion
stages.description: Turn a signed deal into a clean start — clear ownership, smooth onboarding, and zero lost momentum.

stages.title: Retention
stages.description: Protect the relationship after the sale. Surface risks early, strengthen adoption, and grow accounts responsibly.

about.title: Your Guide
about.name: Richard Norwood, PMP
about.bio: My approach to commercial systems is rooted in managing businesses as metrics. From facilitating community access to care in Alabama to leading continuous improvement and regional sales, my focus has always been on system-level enablement. As a certified Project Management Professional, I bring the delivery discipline that turns scattered activity into orchestrated outcomes.
